title: selinum ibericum
intro: Selinum ibericum, also known as Spanish selder, is a perennial herb belonging to the carrot family, characterized by its fern-like foliage and clusters of small yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Selinum ibericum include relieving digestive issues, soothing respiratory problems, and reducing pain and inflammation. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
